stemHtml: During the initial climb-out an airplane has its trim in the neutral position. As the aircraft continues to climb, the pilot realises that the aircraft's elevator trim is stuck in the low speed range. Knowing that the aircraft is climbing with trimmed thrust, the pilot may expect the stick forces to ...

options.a: remain the same, because the failure happened in a neutral trim.
options.c: have a large increase, equal to the wanted control surface deflection.
